target: 4. Where Is the Time Capsule?
So, where did we bury the time capsule?

Ah, that's what I wanted to talk about.
Shinpei, listen up.
Ah, right.
Where did we bury it again?

Huh!?
Hey, where the hell were you walking?

Heh heh, I thought if I just started walking,
something might come back to me.
Big sis always acts before she thinks.

So, I'm still looking for info.
Shinpei, do you remember anything?

Hmm…?
I probably forgot about the time capsule entirely.
What about Mio?

I remember we put something in together,
but that's all…
How about Kaori?

I'm sorry.
I don't remember anything…
Oh, right…

Sou and Tokiko!
Those two were there too.

Should we call them?
Maybe they remember something.
Yeah, let's give them a call!

Hello? Sou?
It's me, Ushio.
I need to ask you something…

Back in elementary school, we buried a time capsule, right?
I was thinking about digging it up,
but I can't remember where.

Do you remember anything, Sou?
Yeah, yeah…

Oh, right?
Then what about Tokiko?

…Yeah, I get it.
See you later.
D-did it go okay…?

Ah, he didn't remember anything either.
Tokiko didn't know the location either.
Phew…
…What should we do now?

I… I just remembered something.
Wasn't it Big Sis who buried it?
…Huh?

Ah… you're right.
She said she was going alone that day…
Ah, I remember now!

If everyone knew, someone might have dug it up already,
so Ushio went alone to bury it.
That's right…?
Huh, really, Big Sis…
How are we supposed to do anything if the person herself forgot?

You're right.
Now that you mention it,
I think I might have done it alone…

…Oh, I'm starting to remember!
There was definitely a note!
A note with the location where we buried it!

Of course me.
I never leave anything to chance.

Alright!
If that's the case, I'll go back and find that note!
Ah, she's off again without asking…
Wait, Big Sis!
Phew…

Then, Kaori.
We should go too.
Y-yeah…
